title: Seeds whos child are Rei AND KAWORU lilith and adam
display_title: Seeds whos child are Rei AND KAWORU lilith and adam
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Hei » Tue Nov 22, 2011 10:37 pm so,im no sooo into-depth about this...i mean i really dont know that much to understand your theory(the user with the duck kinda avatar) but i just wanna know,the Being on central Dogma was actually lilith right?...so the eva,s where created based on Adam on the artic studies....so are the angels created by Adam.and humans are created by Lilith,so we practically stole Adam,s tecnology and use it against him implanting human souls into the copies so they become atacched to the pilots...why no pilot older than 14 can be an eva pilot? and whos child are Rei AND KAWORU, lilith and adam???why cant they touched each other??why the angels try to reach central dogma or lilith???is Rei an Angel???wich one is her.....

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:28 am >the user with the duck kinda avatar That's Reichu, one of the admins who isn't around so much these days to entertain us with her unique perspective on the series, alas. >Being on central Dogma was actually lilith right? Yes >so are the angels created by Adam In as much as children are created by their parents. >humans are created by Lilith As above, only at more distant remove >we practically stole Adam,s technology Well, sorta reverse-engineered the easy bits of seed metabiology, and cloned sub-Adam things. >why no pilot older than 14 can be an eva pilot? Because super robot anime. In story, because the mothers of the main pilots had their children in '01 and then continued working on Project-E. Something could be handwaved about the side-effects of 2I. >whos child are Rei AND KAWORU, lilith and adam Rei is part of Lilith's soul implanted into a Yui/Lilith hybrid husk; Kaworu is some/all of Adam implanted into some similar vessel (some of the more out-there speculation suggests Katsuragi-hakase/Adam). >why cant they touched each other They are two competing forms/systems of life >why the angels try to reach central dogma or lilith? Because plot. >is Rei an Angel???wich one is her Yes, Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Nov 23, 2011 12:02 pm Also, age doesn't really enter into the piloting bit. If the Evas were around when Shinji and/or Asuka were in their 30s they could still presumably pilot them. Also also, the Angels want to reach Adam (they think Lilith is Adam) so they can reset the planet and seed it with its proper ecosystem (i.e. one derived from Adam). Most of them don't seem to understand this on a conscious level, though, and are simply obeying instinctual urges: fight lilim, reunite with the progenitor, profit!

[]:             Quote Post by Lain » Wed Nov 23, 2011 2:21 pm Mr. Tines: Rei is part of Lilith's soul implanted into a Yui/Lilith hybrid husk This has always bugged me a little bit. Did Rei get all of Lilith's soul initially? She (apparently) lost some of it to Unit 00 either right before or after Rei I was killed, or at least that's what I've been lead to believe. When Rei confronts the Lilith body in EoE it "says" Welcome Home which implies it still has some capacity for thought and would that mean it also still has a bit of soul left?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:05 pm Lain wrote: Did Rei get all of Lilith's soul initially?

[]:             Quote Post by Lain » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:23 pm Gendo must have some serious techno to do all this soul swapping. What I'm wondering now is what happened when Rei I died? Does he have a "soul catcher" of sorts to keep it from floating back into Lilith or going to (lol) heaven?

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:36 pm He probley retrieved the soul for Rei I in a similar fashion to the way they recovered Rei II’s soul I think (but how he or Risuko did that is beyond my understanding)

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:39 pm It's never addressed in the show. He presumably used the same process to capture Kaworu's soul and stick it in the Adam embryo in his hand, as it (somehow) wound up in GNR at the end.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:45 pm Lain wrote: Gendo must have some serious techno to do all this soul swapping.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Dec 10, 2011 11:52 pm Mr. Tines wrote: with a reasonable amount left keeping Lilith ticking over and menstruating LCL.
